openings.name: Modern Defense (c6 setup)
openings.plan: Fianchetto bishop, hold center, look for ...b5 or ...e5 break.

openings.name: Englund Gambit
openings.plan: Force tactical chaos, target b2/c3 weakness.

openings.name: Colle–Zukertort System
openings.moves: 1.d4 d5  2.Nf3 Nf6  3.e3 e6  4.Bd3 c5  5.b3 Nc6  6.Bb2 Bd6
openings.plan: e3 + b3 + Bb2 fianchetto, dark bishop stays home (NO early Bf4). Aim the e4 break and kingside attack.

openings.name: Four Knights (Belgrade / Halloween)
openings.plan: Develop both knights (Four Knights). Spring Halloween 4.Nxe5 or Belgrade 4.d4 exd4 5.Nd5 for bullet surprise.

principles: Blunder check — 3 candidate moves before every move
10–15 tactics per day, accuracy over speed
Opening principles ≥ lines: center, development, castle
Review every loss — find the eval-flip move
One opening per side, played always
